---
title: "介入心臟學 — Interventional Cardiology"
---

## 教學講義 Handouts

- [CTA 導引 CTO PCI 教學講義.md](CTA 導引 CTO PCI 教學講義.md)
- [EuroIntervention 2026年3月 介入心臟學最新進展 教學講義.md](EuroIntervention 2026年3月 介入心臟學最新進展 教學講義.md)
- [EuroIntervention Day-case PCI 2026 教學講義.md](EuroIntervention Day-case PCI 2026 教學講義.md)
- [Persistent Sciatic Artery 持續性坐骨動脈.md](Persistent Sciatic Artery 持續性坐骨動脈.md)
- [Side Branch Loss Prevention 預防分支血管丟失 教學講義.md](Side Branch Loss Prevention 預防分支血管丟失 教學講義.md)
- [calcium-intravascular-imaging-literature-review.md](calcium-intravascular-imaging-literature-review.md)
- [thrombus-aspiration-literature-review.md](thrombus-aspiration-literature-review.md)
- [冠狀動脈分叉病變治療文獻回顧 教學講義.md](冠狀動脈分叉病變治療文獻回顧 教學講義.md)

## LaTeX Files

- EuroIntervention 2026-01-05.tex
- EuroIntervention EMB 2026 教學講義.tex
- EuroIntervention EMB 2026.tex
- JACC NY Cardiac Registries 2012 教學講義.tex
- PISCES_fish_oil_hemodialysis.tex
- Persistent Sciatic Artery 2026-01-10.tex
